## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why, include a "Fixes #ISSUE_NUMBER" line if this fixes an existing issue.

## Checklist

Please complete all items before requesting review:

- [ ] I have taken the time to understand the relevant code and surrounding context.
- [ ] I have acknowledged any AI assistance used for this contribution (tools, scope, and where it was applied).
- [ ] I have added appropriate tests and run them successfully.
- [ ] I have run `make changelog` and included the resulting changelog entry.

## Notes for Contributors

Maintainer review time is a limited shared resource. Pull requests that do not follow this template create avoidable work and may be closed without review. Repeatedly ignoring these requirements may result in temporary or permanent contribution restrictions, including a ban from contributing.
